rows.label: tev025501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Ada about Himeri.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Ada if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0001
rows.name:
I think of Himeri like a big sister.
I mean, not that she's older than
me—not by a long shot. Ha! I wish...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0002
rows.name:
But before I knew it, I was going to
her with concerns that I couldn't share
with my colleagues or boyfriend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0003
rows.name:
And she never judges, which is
amazing—especially considering some
of the stupid crap I've laid on her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ever since we started our journey
on the White Whale, she's been a
pillar of strength for all of us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0005
rows.name:
But it's bound to end at some
point. No one can keep up that
Little Miss Helper act for too long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Well, right now my mind is
always on my live-in boyfriend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0009
rows.name:
He's a BLADE, so you never
know what might happen when
he goes out into the field.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Hey, don't look at me like that! You
think I've gone soft just because I'm
worried about the person I love?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Listen, when we finally find the
Central Life, we're going to start
new lives here on Mira, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0012
rows.name:
So thinking about fighting all
the time is pointless. It's love
that will forge the future![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Ada about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0013
rows.name:
I can tell poor Himeri has been
down in the dumps ever since
that business with Ornela.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0014
rows.name:
I mean, not that I can blame her.
Nothing hurts more than getting
shafted by someone you trust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0015
rows.name:
But this isn't just sadness or anger. It's
more like... Well, it's hard to say. Hell,
you know how complex of a person she is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0016
rows.name:
I wish there was something I
could do for her. Goodness knows
she's always there for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Ada about the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Ada about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0017
rows.name:
I looked into the people that
traitor Ornela was connected with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0018
rows.name:
It sounds like more of those
shape-shifter freaks may have
managed to infiltrate NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0019
rows.name:
Can you imagine? Any one of us could
be an alien in disguise right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0020
rows.name:
It's bad enough the Growth have all those
horrible weapons—they don't need to wage
psychological war on us as well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0023
rows.name:
You remember when we all went looking
for that diary for Himeri? Well, I
ended up making loads of friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0024
rows.name:
It turned out everyone on the search
had a Himeri story. She's done good
things for so many people![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0025
rows.name:
Once we got to talking about her, we hit it
off like one big happy family. Folks as nice
as Himeri really bring out the best in you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Even that grump Quentin—okay, so I REALLY don't
like Quentin. But even he went on and on about
Himeri like she was some kind of saint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025501_MSG0027
rows.name:
He seemed really touched by what she did
for him. For a split second, I could have
sworn the guy actually had a heart.[ST:wait ]
